---
title: "variant calling"
author: "SUBHASH MAHAMKALI"
date: "05/19/2024"
output: NULL
DATA : "Raw unmapped fastq reads ( paired end) WGS of SAP"
---

#Run the below pipeline for the subset of the data
#below three samples belong to PI564163 (BTX623) from SAP

```{bash}
ml SRAtoolkit
fastq-dump --split-files --gzip ERR8093223
fastq-dump --split-files --gzip ERR8092974
fastq-dump --split-files --gzip ERR8093245
```

#align all the files with accesion PI nummber and have 2 files farward and reverse fastq files.

```{bash}
cat ERR8092974_1.fastq.gz ERR8093223_1.fastq.gz ERR8093245_1.fastq.gz > PI_564163_1.fastq.gz
cat ERR8092974_2.fastq.gz ERR8093223_2.fastq.gz ERR8093245_2.fastq.gz > PI_564163_2.fastq.gz
```

#quality control 

```{bash}
#used fastqc to generate quality report
ml fastqc
fastqc *.fastq.gz

#used fastp to filter the low quality reads and adapter sequences 
ml fastp
fastp -i PI_564163_1.fastq.gz -I PI_564163_2.fastq.gz  -o PI_564163_1_trim.fastq.gz -O PI_564163_2_trim.fastq.gz -c --thread=4 -Q > fastp.log

```

#alignment 

```{bash}
ml bowtie/2.5
#building index file from the refrence genome
bowtie2-build Sbicolor_730_v5.0.fa.gz sorghum 

#aligning read files (Farward and Reverse) with refrence genome
#later used samtools for filtering low quality mapped reads and converting sam to bam format and sorting based on chromosome and position
#sorting the 
bowtie2 -p 8 -x /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/4.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/sorghum -1 /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/3.fastp_filtering/PI_564163_1_trim.fastq.gz -2 /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/3.fastp_filtering/PI_564163_2_trim.fastq.gz --rg-id PI_564163 --rg "PL:ILLUMINA" --rg "SM:PI_564163"|samtools view --threads 8 -bS -f 2 -q 30 -h - | samtools sort -m 32G --threads 8 -o PI_564163.srt.bam - 

```

#mark duplicates

```{bash}
#used picard to flag duplicates
ml picard/3.0
picard  MarkDuplicates \
INPUT=/work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/5.alignment/PI_564163.srt.bam \
OUTPUT=/work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/6.picard/PI_564163_dup.bam \
METRICS_FILE=/work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/6.picard/marked_dup_metrics.txt \
CREATE_INDEX=true \
REMOVE_DUPLICATES=true  

```

###skipped base recalibration score step 
#proceded to call variants using gatk - HaplotypeCaller
#obtaining gvcf file for the entire genome and then merge all the variant sites to obtain vcf file for all the samples.

```{bash}
ml gatk4/4.4
gatk HaplotypeCaller \
    -R /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/4.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/Sbicolor_730_v5.0.fa \
    -I /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/6.picard/PI_564163_dup.bam \
    -O /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/7.GATK_gvcf_variant_calling/PI_564163_dedup.g.vcf \
    -ERC GVCF \
    --native-pair-hmm-threads 8
    
# for this sample I have called variants in vcf 
    
    ml gatk4/4.4
gatk HaplotypeCaller \
    -R /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/4.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/Sbicolor_730_v5.0.fa \
    -I /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/6.picard/PI_564163_dup.bam \
    -O /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/8.vcf/PI_564163_dedup.vcf
    
```

#consolidate and joint call variant for all the samples

```{bash}
ml gatk4/4.4
gatk SelectVariants -R /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/4.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/Sbicolor_730_v5.0.fa -V /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/7.GATK_gvcf_variant_calling/PI_564163_dedup.g.vcf --select-type SNP -O /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/7.GATK_gvcf_variant_calling/SNPS.vcf

```

#called the raw snps and indels from genrated vcf file 

```{bash}
ml gatk4/4.4
#extracting snps and indels from vcf
gatk SelectVariants -R /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/4.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/Sbicolor_730_v5.0.fa.gz -V /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/8.vcf/PI_564163_dedup.vcf --select-type SNP -O /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/9.snps_indels/raw_snps.vcf
gatk SelectVariants -R /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/4.refrence/Phytozome/PhytozomeV13/Sbicolor/v5.1/assembly/Sbicolor_730_v5.0.fa.gz -V /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/8.vcf/PI_564163_dedup.vcf --select-type INDEL -O /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/0.test/1.Raw_reads/9.snps_indels/raw_indel.vcf

```
